summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app iteration 80. Verified all requested changes: (1) MapControls simplified to 7 buttons only (hamburger, filter, zoom+, level, zoom-, HERE/SAT, follow/heading-up), (2) No duplicate buttons for heading-up, north-up, compass, traffic flow, route reasoning, overview, (3) Weigh stations excluded from POI filter list and getPoiCategory returns 'excluded', (4) POI panel has collapsible header with count and scrollable list. All 15 features tested and working.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Guest login (Continue as Guest + skip tutorial) - works correctly
VERIFIED: Navigation view renders with satellite tiles (HERE logistics.satellite.day) and 55° map tilt
VERIFIED: Map controls simplified - Only 7 buttons visible: hamburger (≡), filter, zoom+, zoom level, zoom-, HERE/SAT, follow/heading-up
VERIFIED: No duplicate buttons - heading-up, north-up, compass, traffic flow, route reasoning, overview buttons correctly removed
VERIFIED: Follow/Heading-Up button (navigation arrow icon) works - click centers on user and enables follow mode
VERIFIED: Filter button opens POI filter panel with categories (NO weigh station in the list - confirmed in code)
VERIFIED: HERE/SAT toggle switches between HERE map and Mapbox SAT view
VERIFIED: Route calculation works - typed 'Dallas TX', clicked ROUTE, gold polyline rendered with 3 route alternatives
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows PRIMARY (9h 54m, 661.4 mi, $358.17), ALT 1 (10h 34m, 674.3 mi, $365.15), ALT 2 (10h 32m, 694.3 mi, $376.00)
VERIFIED: Turn-by-turn navigation header shows maneuver instruction ('Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway. Go')
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions panel shows warnings ('ROUTE GOES THROUGH TOLL BOOTH THAT REQUIRES TRANSPONDER')
VERIFIED: Weather widget visible with temperature (42° CLOUDY, 9 MPH NNE wind, 14.5 MI visibility)
VERIFIED: MUTCD speed limit sign visible (35 mph shown on route)
VERIFIED: Sidebar tabs all work (Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings, Announcements)
VERIFIED: Display tab HUD toggles work - shows 22/22 visible elements, SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL, Trip Panel Position, Speed Warning Tolerance
VERIFIED: IOWA state badge visible at bottom center
VERIFIED: Compass rose visible at bottom right corner
CODE VERIFIED: getPoiCategory() returns 'excluded' for weigh stations (line 471-473 in PoiIcon.tsx)
CODE VERIFIED: MapControls filter list does NOT include weigh_station (lines 140-167 in MapControls.tsx)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App successfully uses HERE Maps JS API v3.1 with logistics.satellite.day tiles. Map tilt is 55° by default. MapControls simplified to 7 buttons only (hamburger, filter, zoom+, level, zoom-, HERE/SAT, follow/heading-up). Duplicate buttons removed (heading-up, north-up, compass, traffic flow, route reasoning, overview). Weigh stations excluded from POI filter and getPoiCategory returns 'excluded'. POI panel has collapsible header with count badge and scrollable max-h-[35vh] container. Marker interpolation dampened: lerp=0.06, dead-zone=0.5m, throttled to 20fps. Gemini TTS API key is leaked - app falls back to native TTS. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

guest_login.details: Guest login button works, navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard, tutorial skip works

navigation_view_satellite_tilt.details: HERE logistics.satellite.day tiles load with 55° tilt perspective visible

map_controls_simplified.details: Only 7 buttons visible: hamburger (≡), filter, zoom+, zoom level indicator, zoom-, HERE/SAT toggle, follow/heading-up

no_duplicate_buttons.details: Confirmed NO separate buttons for: heading-up, north-up, device compass, traffic flow, route reasoning, overview

follow_heading_up_button.details: Navigation arrow icon button works - click centers on user location and enables follow mode

filter_panel_no_weigh_station.details: Filter panel opens with POI categories. Weigh station NOT in list (confirmed in code: MapControls.tsx lines 140-167)

here_sat_toggle.details: HERE/SAT toggle button switches between HERE map (logistics.satellite.day) and Mapbox SAT view

route_calculation.details: Route calculated from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Dallas, TX - gold route polyline rendered with 3 alternatives

turn_by_turn_navigation.details: Navigation header shows 'Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway. Go'

truck_restrictions_panel.details: TRUCK RESTRICTIONS (1) panel shows 'ROUTE GOES THROUGH TOLL BOOTH THAT REQUIRES TRANSPONDER'

weather_widget.details: Shows 42° CLOUDY, 9 MPH NNE wind, 14.5 MI visibility, 3-day forecast

mutcd_speed_limit_sign.details: SPEED LIMIT 35 sign visible near user marker after routing

poi_panel_collapsible.details: POI panel has collapsible header with count badge, scrollable max-h-[35vh] container, clicking POI centers map (verified in NavigationView.tsx)

sidebar_tabs.details: All 14 sidebar tabs clickable and functional

display_hud_toggles.details: Display Layout tab shows 22/22 visible elements, SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL, Trip Panel Position, Speed Warning Tolerance

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.
known_issues.geolocation: Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP geolocation fallback. Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
